title: habenella obtusa
intro: Habenella obtusa is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the dandelion or sunflower family. It is a flowering plant native to certain regions, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and protect against cell damage. The leaves and roots of Habenella obtusa can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to support overall health and well-being.
